About me

I'm a marketing operations leader who thrives at the center of complexity. I specialize in owning campaigns end to end, connecting creative vision to operational execution, and have had the privilege of working at the most recognized entertainment and tech brands in the world. I began managing individual pieces of campaigns at Blizzard Entertainment and HBO Max, took on international campaign ownership at Apple, and now run multi-title global campaigns across brand, events, and film simultaneously at Netflix.

I operate with full visibility across the campaign: every stakeholder, every handoff, every risk. I am known for arriving prepared with several contingency plans and for the ability to pivot quickly, think clearly under pressure, and keep campaigns on track no matter what changes. I build trust quickly across every team to ensure the campaign ships on time, on budget, and set the standard for how great campaigns get made.

Warner Bros. x HBO Max · 2021
17 films. One historic day-and-date release.
Signature project — Warner Bros. day-and-date 2021
17 films. Simultaneous theatrical and streaming release.
Warner Bros. released its entire 2021 slate simultaneously in cinemas and on HBO Max. I ensured every AV asset and piece of key art for all 17 films — including Dune and The Matrix Resurrections — cleared the full pipeline, passed QC, and was localized across 12+ languages on time for every release date.

The Overwatch League
Where it started — esports at global scale
The Overwatch League was one of the world's largest esports properties. I coordinated content and assets across all 20 league teams, partnered with localization teams on four-language distribution, and used analytics to drive measurable audience growth.
